positive: A minimalist, highly detailed celestial cityscape viewed from above. The composition features geometric nebula clusters forming abstract, comforting shapes, framing a central, luminous crescent moon and a stylized, stylized mountain range that evokes serenity. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, soft gold, and ethereal teal, utilizing strong gradients and high contrast to define celestial structures. The style is a blend of Art Deco architecture and cosmic illustration, rendered with sharp, crisp lines and a silkscreen printing aesthetic. Focus on clean silhouettes and symmetrical balance suitable for printing on apparel. Perfect symmetry, vector illustration quality, negative space utilization, symmetrical, macro print art.
